summary: Unit tests for buildLLMClient covering all provider branches with a live httptest Ollama mock

observations.text: Uses httptest.NewServer to simulate Ollama's / (health) and /api/tags (model list) endpoints — tests are self-contained and do not require a real Ollama instance
Tests only cover buildLLMClient; storeChannel, storeMessages, updateSyncState, ensureSourceChannel, and the two adapter types have no unit tests
